raw_consumer_statement: Citi Bank Visa fail to cancel my card and issue a new one once i reported the fraud charges. The fraud team could not speak XXXX clearly. I ask for another person. The person wasnt much better. I got a new card 3 months later. They use a script to answer my question. Could not have a regular conversation. I had refuse to pay and they hurt my credit rating. I also did not activate the new card. This happen XXXX if 2023. They harass me on the phone and ask the to stop calling me. I would recieved letters stating they wanted me to call. I called before their deadline. Then they gave me a letter stating i did not call and decline to investgate after several months of contact.
